extraFaq.question: How long does a business website take to launch?
extraFaq.answer: Typical corporate sites run 3–6 weeks depending on page count, content readiness, and approval speed. We share a milestone calendar before work starts.

extraFaq.question: Do you provide content writing?
extraFaq.answer: We structure pages for SEO and can draft technical outlines; you may supply final industry copy or we can recommend partners for long-form writing.
